rtg_gates.name: functional
rtg_gates.description: Tests execute exported runtime functions or services rather than frozen constants.

rtg_gates.name: permission
rtg_gates.description: Runtime actions execute authz evaluate paths for fail-closed permission outcomes.

rtg_gates.name: audit
rtg_gates.description: Mutating runtime actions append audit evidence and verify hash-chain behavior where applicable.

rtg_gates.name: security
rtg_gates.description: Runtime evidence runs in synthetic sandbox with no real data, credentials, or product writes.

rtg_gates.name: regression
rtg_gates.description: The closing commit records npm test, validators, and closeout-pack sweep results.

m365_relationship.policy: Future M365 runtime packs must satisfy both the M365 admission gate and RTG-001 through RTG-005.

non_weakening_clause: Closed packs are not edited or reinterpreted as runtime-ready.
New checks are boundary-gated after CP00-327.
runtime_ready is an additive implication gate, not a status enum.
